title: Letter from Chair, CSPL, to Minister of State for Local Government and English Devolution
body: "Doug Chalmers, Chair, CSPL, to Jim McMahon OBE MP, Minister of State for Local Government and English Devolution.  CSPL’s response to Ministry of Housing,  Communities &  Local Government’s  consultation on ‘Strengthening the Standards and Conduct Framework for Local Authorities in England’. "
